active_ingredients.name: Glyphosate (as IPA salt)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: EPSP synthase inhibitor absorbed through leaves and translocated to roots causing complete plant death

mode_of_action_summary: Blocks amino acid synthesis in weeds through the shikimate pathway, stopping growth and killing the plant from leaf to root.
farmer_symptoms: ہر قسم دی گھاس ختم کرنی اے
ڈھوب گھاس قابو نہیں آ رہی
بوائی توں پہلاں کھیت صاف کرنا اے
کھیت وچ پرانی جڑی بوٹی کھڑی اے
باغ دے تھلے زمین صاف کرنی اے
واٹاں تے نہر کنارے گھاس ختم کرنی اے
ہل چلائے بغیر گھاس مارنی اے

dosage.application_coverage: 1–2 acres per liter depending on weed density

application_details.application_method: Post-emergence foliar directed spray on weeds
application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform spray on green actively growing weeds

water_management.before_spray: Ensure weeds are actively growing with adequate soil moisture
water_management.after_spray: Avoid irrigation or rainfall for at least 6 hours

weather_conditions.ideal_condition: Moderate temperature with actively growing weeds

crop_safety.selectivity_reason: Non-selective herbicide kills all green plants on contact
crop_safety.overdose_effect: Severe damage or death of contacted crop plants

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Rotate with herbicides of different mode of action such as paraquat or glufosinate.

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place away from direct sunlight

farmer_benefits: Controls annual and perennial weeds in one spray

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can we spray Round-Up on standing crop?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: No, it is a non-selective herbicide and will kill the crop.

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we sow the next crop after spray?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Next crop can be sown 3–7 days after application.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does it control khabbal and dhoob?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it is highly effective against deep-rooted perennial weeds.

frequently_asked_questions.question: How long does it take to kill weeds?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yellowing starts in 3–5 days and complete kill occurs in 14–21 days.

search_keywords: ہر قسم دی گھاس مار دوا
بوائی توں پہلاں جڑی بوٹی ختم
llm_usage_hint: Recommend only for pre-sowing, land preparation, orchard floor and non-crop weed control where complete vegetation kill is required.

master_descriptions.english: Round-Up 48% SL is a non-selective systemic herbicide that kills all types of weeds from leaf to root and is mainly used for land preparation and non-crop weed control.
master_descriptions.urdu: راؤنڈ اپ 48٪ ایس ایل ایک نان سلیکٹو سسٹمک جڑی بوٹی مار دوا ہے جو تمام اقسام کی جڑی بوٹیوں کو جڑ سمیت ختم کرتی ہے اور زیادہ تر بوائی سے پہلے زمین صاف کرنے کے لیے استعمال ہوتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: راؤنڈ اپ 48٪ ایس ایل اک نان سلیکٹو سسٹمک جڑی بوٹی مار اے جو ہر قسم دی گھاس نوں جڑ توں ختم کردا اے تے زیادہ تر بوائی توں پہلاں زمین صاف کرن لئی ورتیا جاندا اے۔
